mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.parent_id AS parentId, m.menu_name AS menuName, m.menu_type AS menuType, m.path, m.component, m.icon, m.sort, m.visible FROM admin_user_role ur INNER JOIN admin_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id AND r.status = 1 AND r.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN admin_role_menu rm ON r.id = rm.role_id INNER JOIN admin_menu m ON rm.menu_id = m.id AND m.status = 1 AND m.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ur.user_id = #{adminId} AND m.visible = 1 ORDER BY m.sort ASC, m.id ASC

select id, parent_id as parentId, menu_name as menuName, menu_type as menuType, path, component, icon, sort, visible, status, remark, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from admin_menu where is_deleted = 0 order by parent_id asc, sort asc, id asc
select count(*) from admin_menu where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into admin_menu ( parent_id, menu_name, menu_type, path, component, icon, sort, visible, status, remark, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time, is_deleted ) values ( #{dto.parentId}, #{dto.menuName}, #{dto.menuType}, #{dto.path}, #{dto.component}, #{dto.icon}, #{dto.sort}, #{dto.visible}, #{dto.status}, #{dto.remark}, #{adminId}, #{adminId}, now(), now(), 0 )
mapper.update: update admin_menu set parent_id = #{dto.parentId}, menu_name = #{dto.menuName}, menu_type = #{dto.menuType}, path = #{dto.path}, component = #{dto.component}, icon = #{dto.icon}, sort = #{dto.sort}, visible = #{dto.visible}, status = #{dto.status}, remark = #{dto.remark}, update_by = #{adminId}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
update admin_menu set status = #{dto.status}, update_by = #{adminId}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select count(*) from admin_menu where parent_id = #{parentId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.delete: update admin_menu set is_deleted = 1, update_by = #{adminId}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
